message:
feat(fcp-cli): add `fcp capabilities` command with report, suggest, and export (46 tests)

Implements the CLI interface for capability usage analytics:
- `fcp capabilities report` — per-zone usage breakdown with risk tiers
- `fcp capabilities suggest` — least-privilege recommendations (remove/review/keep)
- `fcp capabilities export` — raw aggregate JSON export
- Supports --zone, --connector, --filter, --json, --compact flags
- Wired to fcp-telemetry recommendation engine
- 46 tests covering report building, suggestions, filtering, and serde

Closes bead 1rso (CAP CLI reports + export)

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
